[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A rerun Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 9/20 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Izuna, 2★ Shizuko

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 9/20 (Tue) After Maintenance – 9/27 (Tue) 01:59 (UTC)![kEOsCrjNHoCFxQJraCJmDMFgajprnsCL.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/kEOsCrjNHoCFxQJraCJmDMFgajprnsCL.jpg)
